name: Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), West Jaintia Hills
description: An agricultural extension center by ICAR providing farmers with the latest technologies, high-yield seeds, and training.
businessValue: Partnership for training supplying farmers on optimal organic farming practices for Lakadong Turmeric, improving yield and quality.

name: National Cooperative Database
description: The Ministry of Cooperation's portal for cooperative societies across India.
businessValue: Identify and partner with existing registered farmer cooperatives in Meghalaya. Vital for compliance and accessing federal subsidies.

name: KVK West Jaintia Hills Facebook
description: The digital presence for local agricultural/administrative updates in the Jaintia Hills region.
businessValue: Real-time updates on agricultural fairs, weather advisories, government distributions, and community sentiment.

name: Megha-LAMP (MBMA)
description: A rural finance initiative by the Meghalaya Basin Management Agency (MBMA) providing financial inclusion and market access.
businessValue: Guide partner farmers to access capital and subsidies. Stronger, financially secure farmers mean a more reliable supply chain.

name: MFEC - Lakadong GI Tag Announcement
description: Official announcement that Lakadong Turmeric has secured the Geographical Indication (GI) tag.
businessValue: Massive unique selling proposition (USP) in international markets. Guarantees authenticity and allows commanding a premium price.
